gates.name: North Gate (Gate A)
gates.accessibility: Tactile paving, 1:12 slope ramp, low-counter turnstiles, assistance kiosk.

gates.name: Northeast Gate (Gate B)
gates.accessibility: Zero-step level entrance, automatic wide sliding doors.

gates.name: Southeast Gate (Gate C)
gates.accessibility: Dedicated wheelchair assistance lane, electric shuttle transfer station.

gates.name: South Gate (Gate D)
gates.accessibility: Dual-platform passenger elevators, level landing areas, sensory-friendly entry lane.

gates.name: Southwest Gate (Gate E)
gates.accessibility: Direct connection to wheelchair-accessible parking, covered canopy, 1:15 ramp.

gates.name: Northwest Gate (Gate F)
gates.accessibility: Level concrete pathway, designated guide dog relief area near entrance.

sections.name: Sections 101-110 (North Lower)
sections.accessibility: Level access via Concourse A; 12 designated wheelchair berths in Row W.

amenities.restrooms: North Concourse Restrooms (Accessible, Gender-Neutral, Baby Changing)
amenities.concessions: Burger Pavilion (Standard/GF options), Stadium Draft Beer

sections.name: Sections 111-120 (East Lower)
sections.accessibility: Level access via Concourse B; 14 wheelchair berths in Row W.

amenities.concessions: El Tri Tacos (Gluten-Free Tortillas, Vegan Chorizo), Soft Drinks

sections.name: Sections 121-130 (South Lower)
sections.accessibility: Level access via Concourse D; Elevator next to Section 125; 16 wheelchair berths.

amenities.restrooms: South Concourse Restrooms (Accessible, Sensory-Decompression Zone adjacent)

sections.name: Sections 131-140 (West Lower)
sections.accessibility: Level access via Concourse E; 12 wheelchair berths.

amenities.concessions: Le Coq Bistro (French Classics, Vegan Baguettes), Brews & Wines

sections.name: Sections 201-215 (North Middle)
sections.accessibility: Accessible via North Elevators (Elevator Bank 1); Level paths to seats.

sections.name: Sections 216-230 (East/South Middle)
sections.accessibility: Accessible via South Elevators (Elevator Bank 2); Level paths.

amenities.concessions: World Cup Cantina (Premium Nachos, Soft Drinks, Cocktails)

sections.name: Sections 231-245 (West Middle)
sections.accessibility: Accessible via West Elevators (Elevator Bank 3); Ramp access to lower rows.

sections.name: Sections 301-320 (North Upper)
sections.accessibility: Requires elevator transport from Main Concourse (Bank 1) or escalators. Ramps available but steep.

amenities.restrooms: Upper Deck North Restrooms (Accessible stall, baby changing)

sections.name: Sections 321-340 (South Upper)
sections.accessibility: Requires elevator transport from South Concourse (Bank 2) or escalators.

amenities.concessions: Snack Counter (Hot dogs, popcorn, standard drinks)

accessibilityServices.wheelchairEscort: Available at all Gates (A-F). Ask any volunteer in a gold vest or visit Assistance Kiosks located at Gate A, Gate D, and Concourse Section 120.
accessibilityServices.elevators: Three main banks: Bank 1 (North, serving 100-300), Bank 2 (South, serving 100-300), Bank 3 (West, serving 100-200). Only ticketed accessibility guests permitted.
accessibilityServices.sensoryRooms: Located at Concourse Section 124. Features sound-dampening, low lighting, and sensory tools. Open to all families/individuals.
